title: 分享一个 Vibe Coding 的双仓库 UI 提速技巧
content: Vibe Coding uses two repositories to speed UI development. One repo contains only the Vue + Tailwind UI, with mock data, while the other holds the full product. All new features are first built in the UI-only repo, allowing AI to quickly generate code and test via automated screenshots that flag any 1‑pixel differences. Once the UI is finalized, AI copies it into the product repo, ensuring precise alignment without breaking existing elements.

content: I built a tool that lets an 8‑GB GPU run a 30‑B MoE model (Qwen3‑30B‑A3B) at 21 tokens/sec, up from 3 tokens/sec with naive settings. Key findings: 1) Offloading MoE expert layers to CPU saves 65 % VRAM and speeds up 7×. 2) KV‑cache type matters—f16 is much faster than iso3, but requires more memory, so compute its size first. 3) The community’s VRAM estimation formula overestimates memory for iso3, so binary search should be used instead. 4) Reducing “parallel slots” from 4 to 1 doubles throughput for single‑user runs. 5) Batch size “ubatch” benefits vary with context length; empirical testing is best. 6) Extractive text summarization (no model inference) compresses conversation 73 % in <1 ms, avoiding per‑slot blocking. The tool, Kaiwu, automates all parameter tuning, supporting OpenAI‑compatible APIs.

content: The image demonstrates a typical diffusion‑based AI image generator. The model starts from random noise, repeatedly denoises it while guided by a text prompt. The process relies on a large, pre‑trained neural network trained on vast image‑text datasets, enabling it to create detailed scenes from simple inputs.

The Flash edition delivers low‑latency, high‑value inference with tiered pricing, while Pro delivers top‑tier performance via a 1.6 T‑parameter MoE architecture. Both versions support non‑thinking and thinking modes, JSON output, tool calls, and agent capabilities. All weights and models are fully open‑source with no feature cuts, enabling affordable, high‑capability deployment.

title: 说实话，我不明白程序员为什么对 AI 的隐私问题这么不关注
content: I recently open‑sourced a project that I posted about on V2EX, but it received no responses, which surprised me. The project was mainly for personal use and I had no expectation of promotion. Even in V2, a community of heavy AI users, people often don’t hesitate to upload sensitive information. I’m concerned that sharing certain notes with large model providers could expose privacy‑sensitive data, despite claims that it won’t be used for training.

title: DeepSeek V4终于发布，打破最强闭源垄断，明确携手华为芯片
content: DeepSeek released GPT‑style V4 models, open‑source and free of proprietary dominance, with two variants: a 1.6 T “Pro” that matches top closed‑source models, and a 284 B “Flash” offering lower cost and faster inference. Both support 1 M token context, a new default, thanks to a token‑level compression and DSA sparse attention technique that reduces compute and memory. The models excel in Agent coding tasks, world knowledge, and reasoning, surpassing many open models and approaching elite closed ones. API access is available under OpenAI and Anthropic interfaces, with Huawei hardware support announced for later 2026.

title: 泡泡玛特为什么拒绝AI？
content: BubbleMart, China's leading blind‑box toy maker, rejects adding AI to its products because it values the “useless, emotional” nature that drives its pricing and collectibility. Introducing AI would shift the model to hardware plus subscription, increase technical and after‑sales risks, dilute scarcity, and conflict with BubbleMart’s IP‑channel ecosystem. While AI toys are attracting investors and new entrants, BubbleMart believes staying focused on its core emotional experience preserves its dominant market position and protects its premium value.

title: Vibe coding 有什么意义？

The product may appear polished, but the underlying instability places the burden on the engineering team.

title: 腾讯混元 Hy3 preview 发布并开源
content: Tencent announced the open‑source release of the Hy3 preview language model on April 23. The model contains 295 billion total parameters, 21 billion active parameters, and supports context lengths up to 256 k tokens. It is the first model trained after the Mixture‑of‑Experts (Mix‑of‑Layers) revision, and Tencent claims it is the most intelligent model in its lineup to date.

title: 普华永道同意向恒大集团部分股东赔偿 10 亿港元
content: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission reached an agreement with PwC Hong Kong, a former auditor of China Evergrande Group, allowing the firm to earmark HK$1 billion for compensation to eligible minority shareholders. The audit firm had reviewed Evergrande’s 2019 and 2020 financial statements, which regulators found to have overstated revenue and profit. Though PwC denies wrongdoing, the regulator believes its audits were flawed and deems the settlement best protects minority shareholders’ interests. Details of the compensation process will be disclosed later.

title: OpenAI 面向医生等开放 ChatGPT 服务

title: 谷歌确认基于 Gemini AI 的苹果新版 Siri 今年亮相
content: Google released at Cloud Next 26 that Apple will launch a new Siri built on Gemini AI in 2026. Apple and Google signed a multi‑year partnership in January for Google to supply core technology as its first‑choice cloud provider; the deal is worth about $1 billion annually. Google will not access user data; processing remains on Apple‑controlled servers. Apple is also developing lightweight models for on‑device use to reduce cloud dependence and improve speed.

title: Meta 内部宣布将裁员 10% 约 8000 个岗位
content: Meta plans to cut 10% of its workforce—about 8,000 employees—and stop hiring the 6,000 open positions slated for May 20. The reduction is meant to improve efficiency and offset high AI spending. Meta has spent heavily this year on AI partnerships, and the executive team says the layoffs will balance those investments. The move follows a leak and comes as other tech firms also trim costs.

title: Anthropic调查Mythos模型遭未授权访问事件

title: 淘宝天猫正式上线售后 AI 假图识别模型
content: Taobao and Tmall have launched an AI-driven fake-image detection system for after‑sales. The tool is now available to merchants with ratings above 4.8, allowing them to flag suspected AI‑edited or distorted product photos via a quick‑reply option in the QianNiu app. Positive detections affect resolution outcomes and trigger alerts. The system covers multiple false‑image types and will broaden its scope as accuracy improves. Last year, the platform’s integrity program saved merchants over 4 billion yuan, and new initiatives for 2026 aim to enhance the business environment.

title: 字节跳动发布新一代 3D 生成大模型 Seed3D 2.0
content: ByteDance has released its next‑generation 3D generation model, Seed3D 2.0. Built on a Mixture‑of‑Experts architecture, the model allows increased parameters and resolution while keeping inference computationally manageable. It produces richer texture details and more precise metal‑roughness boundaries. The technical report is publicly available, and the API is now available through the Volcano Engine.

title: T3 出行向港交所提交上市申请书
content: Nanjing Lixing Technology (T3 Travel) filed a listing application with the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The company, launched by FAW, Dongfeng, Changan, Tencent, and Alibaba, is China’s third‑largest smart mobility platform. It operates ride‑hailing services in 194 cities and has 235 million registered users. T3 is projected to turn profitable in 2025, with GTV rising 10.5% to 18.9 billion CNY and a 13% gross margin, making it the fastest‑profitable platform in China.

title: GPT-5.5: Mythos-Like Hacking, Open to All

title: 100个世界顶级认知
content: The text lists 100 concise insights on cognition and self‑improvement. Key ideas include focusing on peak experiences, leveraging momentum, adopting a systems perspective, applying first‑principles thinking, and cultivating meta‑cognition. It stresses the value of deep work, prioritizing core actions, and learning from failure. Family guidance highlights communication styles, shared projects, and nurturing resilience. The material also covers psychological biases, decision‑making heuristics, and long‑term habits such as sleep, exercise, and continuous learning, all underscored by humility and awareness of future impact.

title: GPT 5.5 发布了
content: OpenAI released GPT‑5.5, which will soon be offered via the Responses and Chat Completions APIs. Pricing is $5 per million input tokens and $30 per million output tokens, with a 1 million‑token context window, slightly higher than GPT‑5.4. The company notes that Codex’s improved token efficiency may provide comparable results at similar costs, though this claim is viewed skeptically.

title: 物料为王！新易盛一季报深度解读：短期扰动不改高景气，Q2起加速兑现，光通信赛道迎黄金周期
content: New EasyG's Q1 2026 report shows earnings miss due to a foreign‑exchange loss, but core operating metrics remain strong. Revenue topped 8 billion CNY with a 49% gross margin, driven by 800 G products and upcoming 1.6 T scale‑up. The company has sharply increased pre‑payments (39×) and inventory to secure critical materials, positioning it for a Q2 performance upswing. The broader optical‑module market, fueled by AI demand, is entering a golden growth phase, with leaders like Zhitui Xuchuang setting supply‑chain dominance.
